overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character standing at a campfire in a rural countryside setting. Rain begins to fall as the character slowly rotates to survey the surrounding landscape, revealing wooden structures and rolling green hills under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite with fire pit under large oak tree

events.description: rain begins to fall, visible as streaks against the sky and tree canopy

agents.ego_description: standing still by the campfire, facing the large tree and open countryside

entered.detail: massive tree with thick trunk and full green canopy providing partial shelter
small stone-ringed fire pit with smoke rising
large decaying log lying on the grass
rocky mountain peaks visible through the haze
small rustic wooden structure with sloped roof

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a campsite beneath a large oak tree with a small campfire burning. Rain begins to fall around the 4-second mark, creating a misty atmosphere. The surrounding area features lush green grass, a fallen log, distant mountains, and a small wooden shed visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with abandoned wagon and small pond

events.description: character begins slowly turning to the right, rotating the camera view clockwise

agents.ego_description: slowly rotating to survey the surroundings, revealing the wooden shed and distant landscape features

entered.detail: broken-down wooden wagon with missing wheels
dark water pool reflecting the gray sky

segments.scene_description: As the character turns right, the view shifts to reveal an abandoned wagon and a small pond in the middle distance. The large oak tree moves to the left side of the frame while the wooden shed becomes more prominent in the center. The rain continues to fall steadily across the open grassland.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural homestead with two-story wooden house

events.description: two-story wooden house comes into full view on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: completing the rotation to face the wooden house and dirt path, surveying the homestead area

entered.detail: weathered blue-gray wooden house with white porch railing and multiple windows
covered front porch with decorative railings
worn dirt track leading toward the house

segments.scene_description: The rotation reveals a two-story weathered wooden house with a covered porch on the right side of the frame. A dirt path leads toward the house through the tall grass. The campfire remains visible on the left while the large tree recedes into the left background, completing the panoramic view of this rural homestead in the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous panoramic rotation from a cozy campsite into a wider view of a rain-swept rural homestead. It begins with the character standing beneath a large oak tree by a burning campfire, as a sudden rainfall descends to create a misty atmosphere over the lush grass and distant mountains. As the camera turns right, the oak tree shifts to the periphery to reveal an abandoned wagon and a small pond nestled within the open grassland. The scene then expands further to bring a weathered two-story wooden house and its covered porch into view, with a dirt path cutting through the tall grass. Finally, the rotation completes the survey of the landscape, leaving the campfire and tree in the background as the focus settles on the desolate homestead under the steady rain.
